source: Robida-Stubbs et al. 2012 - mTOR inhibitor; robust lifespan extension in C. elegans
Cabreiro et al. 2013 - extends C. elegans lifespan via AMPK/mTOR
Howitz et al. 2003 / confirmed in DrugAge
Wan et al. 2013 - extends C. elegans lifespan
Calvert et al. 2016 - PI3K inhibitor; extends C. elegans lifespan
Eisenberg et al. 2009 - polyamine; extends C. elegans lifespan via autophagy
Liao et al. 2011 - confirmed in DrugAge
Solis et al. 2018 - antibiotic; extends lifespan in C. elegans
Banse et al. 2024 - confirmed lifespan extender in C. elegans
AlOkda & Van Raamsdonk 2022 - standard vehicle control; no lifespan effect at ≤2%
Universal negative control - no biological activity
Vehicle solvent - no lifespan extension at standard concentrations
Energy source / osmotic control - not a lifespan extender
Osmotic control used in C. elegans experiments - not a lifespan extender
Salt control - not a lifespan extender
Antibiotic used in C. elegans culture - no lifespan extension reported
Structural membrane lipid - not a lifespan extender in C. elegans
